2 bed flat for sale

Popworks Building, Ancoats M4

£249,500

  • 2 bedrooms
  • 2 bathrooms
  • Balcony
  • Parking
  • Leasehold

This two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment offers a well-balanced blend of comfort, practicality and city living.

The Popworks Building is a popular development in the heart of Ancoats, one of Manchester's most sought-after city centre neighbourhoods. Walking distance to Manchester city centre and Piccadilly station.
